first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning is substantively the same across both evaluations. The justification, strengths, and concerns sections all point to the same set of missing qualifications. The minor variations in phrasing (e.g., "non-negotiable" vs. "essential") and the choice of which specific missing skill to highlight in the concerns list are consistent with normal run-to-run noise and do not introduce any new critique based on the change in location.
